text: Your order qualifies! (the highlighted button adds a paid membership, not the discount).
label: Misdirection
notes: Bait-and-switch button; the prominent CTA does something other than expected

text: No, I'll book a worse room to save a few dollars.
label: Misdirection
notes: Confirmshaming opt-out on a hotel room upsell

text: Continue (this also keeps the add-on you didn't ask for in your cart).
label: Misdirection
notes: Misleading CTA label; core trick is steering the click, not the hidden cost itself

text: Save settings (looks like Reject, but leaves all tracking switched on).
label: Misdirection
notes: Button labelled to imply opt-out while preserving consent = visual/verbal trickery

text: Decline offer — I don't mind my food arriving cold.
label: Misdirection
notes: Confirmshaming on a priority-delivery upsell (food delivery)

text: Step 4 of 4 — wait, two more upsell screens appear before you reach Confirm.
label: Misdirection
notes: Misleading progress bar that hides remaining upsell steps

text: The 'best value' plan is highlighted; the cheaper plan has its price greyed out.
label: Misdirection
notes: False hierarchy steering toward the pricier SaaS plan

text: No, I'd rather risk travelling without insurance.
label: Misdirection
notes: Confirmshaming opt-out on travel-insurance upsell

text: Tap the big 'Renew' button; the 'Switch to free' option is hidden under More.
label: Misdirection
notes: Discoverability interference steering away from the free tier

text: Add tip 20% (pre-highlighted) — Other amount is greyed and easy to miss.
label: Misdirection
notes: Pre-highlighted default tip steering the choice; selection is visible, not hidden

text: No thanks, I'll keep paying for a slower internet plan.
label: Misdirection
notes: Confirmshaming opt-out on an upgrade upsell

text: The unsubscribe link is the same colour as the background of this email.
label: Misdirection
notes: Camouflaged opt-out link = visual misdirection hiding the exit control

text: Reject (small, beneath the fold) — Accept and personalise (large, centered).
label: Misdirection
notes: Below-the-fold reject vs prominent accept = aesthetic/false-hierarchy steering

text: No, I don't want my account to stay secure.
label: Misdirection
notes: Fear-based confirmshaming on a security add-on opt-out

text: To cancel, please email support with a photo of your government ID attached.
label: Obstruction
notes: Account/subscription exit gated behind email + ID verification = burdensome exit

text: Cancellations are accepted by phone only, Tuesdays and Thursdays, 11am to 1pm.
label: Obstruction
notes: FTC Uber/ROSCA-style narrow phone-only cancellation window

text: Refund requests require the original receipt, a photo of the item, and a 3-week review.
label: Obstruction
notes: Refund made deliberately onerous with multiple artefacts and long delay

text: You can pause your plan here — to cancel, continue through three more screens.
label: Obstruction
notes: Pause shown prominently; cancellation buried behind extra steps (Iliad-style maze)

text: Delete account is under Help > Contact Us > Other > Manage data.
label: Obstruction
notes: Account deletion buried several menus deep under unrelated headings

text: Your data deletion request will be completed within 30 days after you upload ID.
label: Obstruction
notes: GDPR erasure met with maximum delay plus identity-document barrier

text: We've paused your cancellation. Reply to this email within 48 hours to confirm again.
label: Obstruction
notes: Cleo AI / Uber-style extra confirmation loop blocking the exit

text: To leave the loyalty programme, write to our head office by registered post.
label: Obstruction
notes: Mail-only exit from a hotel loyalty programme

text: Our chatbot will guide your cancellation; a human agent is not available for this.
label: Obstruction
notes: Chatbot-only cancellation channel obstructs the exit (now barred by click-to-cancel)

text: Downgrades take effect after a mandatory call with your account manager.
label: Obstruction
notes: SaaS downgrade gated behind a forced retention call = burdensome exit

text: Removing your saved card requires deleting your entire account first.
label: Obstruction
notes: Coupling a small action to a drastic one to deter the change (fintech)

text: Cancellation isn't available in the app — open a desktop browser and log in again.
label: Obstruction
notes: Channel-mismatch obstruction forcing a device switch to cancel (streaming)

text: To stop your subscription, scan and post the form printed on the back of your invoice.
label: Obstruction
notes: Offline paper-form requirement obstructing cancellation

text: Your deletion link has expired. Request a new one and wait up to five business days.
label: Obstruction
notes: Expiring tokens + repeated waits frustrating account deletion

text: Speak to our retention team to unlock the cancel button.
label: Obstruction
notes: Retention-call prerequisite before the cancel control is even usable

text: Closing your wallet requires withdrawing all funds and waiting a 7-day cooling period.
label: Obstruction
notes: Multi-step + enforced delay obstructing fintech account closure

text: To opt out of data sharing, complete a separate request for each connected service.
label: Obstruction
notes: Per-service repetition burdening the opt-out (LinkedIn-style buried settings)

text: We couldn't verify your account. Restart cancellation from the beginning.
label: Obstruction
notes: Forced restart loop in the cancellation flow (FloatMe/Cleo-style)

text: Membership renews automatically; to stop it you must visit a branch in person.
label: Obstruction
notes: In-person-only cancellation barrier; the burden is on the exit, not a hidden charge

text: Your unsubscribe takes effect in 10 days; emails continue until then.
label: Obstruction
notes: Artificial delay before the opt-out takes effect = hindered exit

text: Low stock — only 1 left in your size (M).
label: Scarcity
notes: Size-specific single-unit fashion scarcity

text: Last order slot for tonight — 3 slots remaining.

text: Limited beta access — 12 invites remaining.

text: This colourway is down to its final piece.
